ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (director:Person {name: 'Christopher Nolan'})-[r1:DIRECTED]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Inception'}),

    p2 = (director)-[r2:ACTED_IN]->(actor1:Person {name: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'}),
    p3 = (actor1)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(movie2:Movie {title: 'Dune'}),

    p4 = (movie1)-[r4:REVIEWED]->(reviewer:Person {name: 'Tom Cruise'}),

    p5 = (director)-[r5:FOLLOWS]->(actor2:Person {name: 'Robert Downey Jr'})

RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4, p5
ground.question: How does the creative dynamic between Christopher Nolan and Leonardo DiCaprio influence the reception of *Inception*, and which films by Leonardo has Tom Cruise most critically praised?

cypher:
MATCH (p1:Person {name: 'Christopher Nolan'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: 'Inception'})
MATCH (p2:Person {name: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)
MATCH (p2)-[:REVIEWED]->(r:Movie)
WITH p2, collect(r) AS leoReviews, collect(r.rating) AS leoRatings
ORDER BY leoRatings DESC
LIMIT 1
MATCH (p2)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2:Movie)
WITH p2, m2
ORDER BY leoRatings DESC
LIMIT 1
RETURN p2.name AS actor, m2.title AS movie
